capabilitiesList() - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.capabilities.CapabilitySet
Get unmodifiable capabilities list to avoid privacy leak
capabilitiesList() - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.GameEntity
Get unmodifiable capabilities list Example #1: if the current entity has the Status.POISONED and Ability.FALL_FROM_CLIFF capabilities, this method will return a list of [Status.POISONED, Ability.FALL_FROM_CLIFF]
capabilitySet - Variable in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.GameEntity
Current capabilities/statuses of this entity
CapabilitySet - Class in edu.monash.fit2099.engine.capabilities
A collection of Capability objects.
CapabilitySet() - Constructor for class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.capabilities.CapabilitySet
 
chanceToHit() - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.weapons.IntrinsicWeapon
An integer of how many percent (as dividend/100) the Actor can hit with this weapon.
chanceToHit() - Method in interface edu.monash.fit2099.engine.weapons.Weapon
A chance to hit the target (this is the dividend of percentage)
chanceToHit() - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.weapons.WeaponItem
Returns the chance to hit the target in integer.
clear() - Method in class edu.monash.fit2099.engine.actions.ActionList
Delete the contents of this collection, leaving it empty.
